case_title: PAMELA E. BROWN VS. AUTO LAB, INC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, PAMELA E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTO LAB, INC $225.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $225.00, CHARGES FOR COLLANT, RADIATOR CAP AND BRAKE FLUID WERE APPROPRIATE, PARTIES TO SHARE COST OF RADIO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-07-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO LAB, INC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD FILED BY BROWN, PAMELA E. AUTO LAB, INC
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, PAMELA E. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM:GEOFFREY HOWARD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTO LAB, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT(SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED. EXPLANATION FOR DECISION:$225 IS THE TOTAL JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF. THE REFERENCE TO SHARING COSTS OF THE RADIO WAS PROVIDED AS EXPLANATION FOR THE AMOUNT AWARDED. -JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD-
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, PAMELA E. AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO LAB, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, PAMELA E. AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO LAB, INC
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, PAMELA E.
